resume_text:
# Alex Rivera

**Email:** alex.rivera.demo@example.com | **Location:** Austin, TX | **GitHub:** https://github.com/alexrivera-demo | **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/alexrivera-demo

## Professional Summary

Senior Site Reliability Engineer with 8+ years in software engineering and infrastructure. Proven track record running AWS and Kubernetes platforms, reducing incident MTTR, and building reliability-focused culture.

## Why Vanta Logistics

Vanta Logistics is a growth-stage logistics SaaS company with a strong SRE culture, remote-first policy, and healthy runway. The role is a senior SRE match with a comp band aligned to my target.

## Relevant Experience

**Senior SRE — Fictional Payments Co** *(2019–Present)*
- Ran a 40-node EKS cluster for payment processing services.
- Reduced P1 incident MTTR from 90 minutes to 35 minutes through runbooks and observability.
- Built Terraform modules adopted across three engineering teams.
- Participated in on-call rotations and blameless postmortems.

**Platform Engineer — Demo SaaS Startup** *(2016–2019)*
- Migrated container workloads from EC2 to GKE.
- Implemented SLOs and error budgets for 12 customer-facing services.

**Software Engineer — Example Logistics** *(2014–2016)*
- Built Python services and maintained PostgreSQL/Redis infrastructure.

## Skills

AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Python, Go, Prometheus, Grafana, PostgreSQL, Redis, CI/CD, incident response, SLOs.

## Education

B.S. Computer Science — Demo State University
